instruction: Build pipelines that use LLMs to extract, normalize, and validate structured data from unstructured documents. Use to design prompts for structured output, handle multi-document batching, validate against schemas, and manage extraction quality. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Use LLMs to extract structured data from unstructured documents with schema validation and quality control.  ## Rules of Schema Design

workflow.action: Define target schema — JSON Schema for the structured output expected from each document type.
Design extraction prompt with schema enforcement, examples, and edge case instructions.
Implement structured output call (response_format or tool_use) with model selection.
Validate LLM output against JSON Schema — reject and retry on schema violation.
Handle batch processing — chunking, parallelism, rate limiting, and cost tracking.
Implement human review queue for low-confidence or schema-failing extractions.

outputContract: Extraction prompt templates per document type.
JSON Schema definitions for all output types.
Validation pipeline with retry and escalation logic.
Batch processing configuration with cost estimate.
